rom_start-evt_start1: Welcome to Mana Magic. Press [S] on keyboard  or [BTN 1] to advance the dialog
What kind of input is the main player going to use?
rom_start-evt_start1_android: Welcome to Mana Magic. Press [ATTACK] to advance the dialog
rom_start-evt_start2: Perfect. I'll configure {option} as the controller for the main player
rom_start-evt_start3:
This is a recreation of Secret of Mana. ¬
It's a whole engine!
There are 3 players that can be controlled by you or by AI
You can change the hero assigned to a controller by pressing the [SWAP/CHANGE] button
rom_start-evt_start3_extra: You can also set more players by pressing the [START] button in other gamepads
rom_start-evt_start4: This engine have two test scenes
Last bosses: As an engine capability test, you will face the last two bosses in "Secret of Mana". Cutscenes included (obvious spoilers ahead)
Free room: Small map with some story
Please select where do you want to go:
rom_start-evt_start5_android: Perfect! I'll teleport you into the {option} scene.
This Engine was meant to be played in PC so there might be controls not available in Phone. Sorry about that
You can find more info and give me feedback, money or nuggets in @cidwel account in Twitter
rom_start-evt_start5: Perfect! I'll teleport you into the {option} scene.
If something goes wrong, you can reset the game by pressing [F12]
You can find more info and give me feedback, money or nuggets in @cidwel account in Twitter
rom_01-evt_start1: You can create monsters clicking in any area with the 2nd mouse button.
You can make a ton if you hold [CTRL] while clicking. Try not to be cruel
rom_01-evt_keyboard: Actually I don't know why I'm still making this thing
rom_darklich-evt_darklich1:
PURIM:Dyluck!~ 
THANATOS:For ages I have been searching...
for a human with the power to conquer this world...
...one born in the shadow of darkness, and raised in the light of Mana.

Dyluck is the one. 
I cannot wait any longer. 
My body has grown weak!
Using his body I will take the Mana Fortress, and rule the world!
rom_darklich-evt_darklich2: PURIM:Dyluck! Resist him with all your might!
rom_darklich-evt_darklich3:
THANATOS:Uhrg...ahh...kack! 
I must...¬hurry...¬This body 
is...breaking up!
rom_darklich-evt_darklich4:
THANATOS:Guwa ha ha! 
How good this new body feels! I grow strong!
PURIM:Liar! You can't just STEAL someone's body!!

THANATOS:My dear, I can do anything I want! 
Ha, ha-huh¬..¬?~ Can't...move!
rom_darklich-evt_darklich6: PURIM...can you hear me? It's me, Dyluck....
He's too strong...I'm finished, but I can help you...
Thanatos is an ancient sorcerer who sold his heart to the underworld.
Though his life force is eternal, he hasn't this own body.
His life force is growing darker. He feeds on hatred and destruction!
rom_darklich-evt_darklich8: PURIM:I'm so sorry I won't see you again. But I have to do this.,

You're RANDI, RIGHT? 
Take care of PURIM...
rom_darklich-evt_darklich9:
PURIM:Dyluck! Stop it! 
Please! Dyluck! STOP IT!! 
THANATOS:Ugrrrrrrr!
rom_darklich-evt_darklich10:
THANATOS:I forbid this! 
Just when I was to be reborn! I...must withdraw!

rom_darklich-evt_killedDarkLich1: The seal on Dryad's "Mana" magic is gone!
rom_darklich-evt_killedDarkLich4:
RANDI:What the..?!¬
 Let's get out of here!

RANDI:What is it?
POPOIE:...whew..!¬
I'm okay...¬just dizzy!
We have to get out of here, NOW!
rom_darklich-evt_manaFortressOutside1:
POPOIE:It's a Mana Beast!
PURIM:Isn't it a Flammie?
RANDI:I guess Flammies were once Mana Beasts...
POPOIE:Hurry, or the Mana Beast will ruin the world!
rom_darklich-evt_manaFortressOutside2:
RANDI:...I can't...
I won't hurt a Mana
Beast! I can't!
They are only trying to restore Mana!

And...¬...POPOIE!
If you use up all your Mana power, you'll dissapear!

PURIM:Oh NO!~
RANDI:Right...I can't go through with this...

POPOIE:...¬...
Whaddaya mean? I'm NOT gonna kick the bucket!
My world is separate from this one. It just means I won't...see you again.
It's ok, if we don't stop the Mana Beast, your world is finished, right?

Everything will perish.
Trees...animals...PEOPLE!
That must not happen!

YOU have the mana Sword
YOU must save this world...
You have no choice!
You made a vow to your mother, the Mana Tree, right? I'll be okay.
rom_02-evt_rabiteQuestStart_0:
POPOIE: Oiiii! I'm tired...¬And hungry!¬
Can we rest a little?
rom_02-evt_rabiteQuestStart_1: PURIM:Eating your food, mine, even the King's one at Tasnica ins't fulfulling for you

That was two hours ago!
¬How could you be hungry?
POPOIE:Black Magic makes me hungry. Stop over abusing me!
rom_02-evt_rabiteQuestStart_2:
RANDI:We're late!
We should bring the seeds to Luka.
She will tell us how to seal them back again!
rom_02-evt_rabiteQuestStart_3:
PURIM:Huh...¬??¬ 
Is that a Rabite?¬ So cute!
Haven't seen one in long time

POPOIE:Can we roast it?¬
I'll take just a bite.¬
I swear!
rom_02-evt_rabiteQuestStart_5: RANDI:NO!¬ The Mana Seeds! That idiot stole them!
rom_02-evt_rabiteQuestStart_6: POPOIE:Grrrr!¬ I'm going to devour that idiot!
rom_02-evt_rabiteQuestField_2:
RANDI:Quick!
We need to recover the seeds!
POPOIE:With barbecue sauce or raw. I don't care!
PURIM:I thought sprites were less... sadistic
rom_02-teleportDeny_1: Hey!¬ The rabite went forth! We have to recover the seeds!
rom_end-evt_end: The demo ends here.¬ Hope you liked it.
You can follow the progress of this engine at my Twitter @cidwel
